```
import './styles.css'

import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import {
  decodeThumbHash,
  type ImageRendererProps,
  useRendererMode,
} from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { Popover, PopoverPanel, PopoverTrigger } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import { $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode } from 'lexical'
import { ExternalLink, ImageIcon, Trash2, Type } from 'lucide-react'
import type { CSSProperties } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import { ImageRenderer } from './ImageRenderer'

type ImageLoadState = 'loading' | 'loaded' | 'error'

function getCaptionText(altText: string, caption?: string): string | undefined {
  if (caption) return caption
  if (!altText) return undefined
  if (altText.startsWith('!') || altText.startsWith('¡')) {
    return altText.slice(1)
  }
  return undefined
}

export function ImageEditRenderer(props: ImageRendererProps) {
  const mode = useRendererMode()

  if (mode !== 'editor') {
    return <ImageRenderer {...props} />
  }

  return <ImageEditRendererInner {...props} />
}

function ImageEditRendererInner({
  src,
  altText,
  width,
  height,
  caption,
  thumbhash,
  accent,
}: ImageRendererProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const editable = editor.isEditable()
  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const srcInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

  const [open, setOpen] = useState(!src)
  const [editSrc, setEditSrc] = useState(src)
  const [editAltText, setEditAltText] = useState(altText)
  const [editCaption, setEditCaption] = useState(caption || '')

  const [state, setState] = useState<ImageLoadState>('loading')

  useEffect(() => {
    setEditSrc(src)
    setEditAltText(altText)
    setEditCaption(caption || '')
  }, [src, altText, caption])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!src) setOpen(true)
  }, [src])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (open) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => srcInputRef.current?.focus())
    }
  }, [open])

  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    [thumbhash],
  )

  const captionText = useMemo(
    () => getCaptionText(altText, caption),
    [altText, caption],
  )

  const commitChanges = useCallback(() => {
    const trimmedSrc = editSrc.trim()
    if (!trimmedSrc) return
    if (!wrapperRef.current) return

    editor.update(() => {
      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
      if (!node) return
      const writable = node.getWritable() as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
      writable.__src = trimmedSrc
      writable.__altText = editAltText.trim()
      writable.__caption = editCaption.trim() || undefined
    })
    setOpen(false)
  }, [editor, editSrc, editAltText, editCaption])

  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    if (!wrapperRef.current) return
    editor.update(() => {
      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
      if (node) node.remove()
    })
    setOpen(false)
  }, [editor])

  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
    if (src) window.open(src, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')
  }, [src])

  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault()
        commitChanges()
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        e.preventDefault()
        setEditSrc(src)
        setEditAltText(altText)
        setEditCaption(caption || '')
        setOpen(false)
      }
    },
    [commitChanges, src, altText, caption],
  )

  if (!editable) {
    return (
      <ImageRenderer
        src={src}
        altText={altText}
        width={width}
        height={height}
        caption={caption}
        thumbhash={thumbhash}
        accent={accent}
      />
    )
  }

  const frameStyle: CSSProperties = {
    backgroundColor: !placeholderUrl ? accent || '#f5f5f5' : undefined,
    backgroundImage:
      placeholderUrl && state !== 'loaded'
        ? `url(${placeholderUrl})`
        : undefined,
    backgroundSize: 'cover',
    width: width ? Math.min(width, 1200) : undefined,
    maxWidth: '100%',
    ...(width && height ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}` } : {}),
  }

  return (
    <Popover
      open={open}
      onOpenChange={(nextOpen: boolean) => {
        setOpen(nextOpen)
        if (!nextOpen) {
          setEditSrc(src)
          setEditAltText(altText)
          setEditCaption(caption || '')
        }
      }}
    >
      <PopoverTrigger
        render={<div ref={wrapperRef} className="rr-image-edit-trigger" />}
      >
        {src ? (
          <figure className="rr-image-root">
            <div
              className={`rr-image-frame rr-image-${state}`}
              style={frameStyle}
            >
              <img
                src={src}
                alt={altText}
                width={width}
                he
... (truncated)
```
</details></tool-use>

```
            <ImageIcon size={24} />
            <span>Click to add image</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </PopoverTrigger>
      <PopoverPanel
        side="bottom"
        sideOffset={8}
        className="rr-image-edit-panel"
      >
        <div className="rr-image-edit-field">
          <ImageIcon className="rr-image-edit-field-icon" size={14} />
          <input
            ref={srcInputRef}
            className="rr-image-edit-input"
            type="url"
            value={editSrc}
            onChange={(e) => setEditSrc(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            placeholder="Image URL"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="rr-image-edit-field">
          <Type className="rr-image-edit-field-icon" size={14} />
          <input
            className="rr-image-edit-input"
            type="text"
            value={editAltText}
            onChange={(e) => setEditAltText(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            placeholder="Alt text"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="rr-image-edit-field">
          <Type className="rr-image-edit-field-icon" size={14} />
          <input
            className="rr-image-edit-input"
            type="text"
            value={editCaption}
            onChange={(e) => setEditCaption(e.target.value)}
            onBlur={commitChanges}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            placeholder="Caption (optional)"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="rr-image-edit-actions">
          <button
            className="rr-image-edit-action-btn"
            type="button"
            onClick={handleOpen}
          >
            <ExternalLink size={14} />
            Open
          </button>
          <button
            className="rr-image-edit-action-btn rr-image-edit-action-btn--end"
            type="button"
            onClick={handleDelete}
          >
            <Trash2 size={14} />
            Remove
          </button>
        </div>
      </PopoverPanel>
    </Popover>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
import { vars } from '@shiro/rich-style-token'
import { globalStyle, keyframes } from '@vanilla-extract/css'

globalStyle('.rr-image-root', { margin: '1.25rem 0', textAlign: 'center' })

globalStyle('.rr-image-frame', {
  position: 'relative',
  display: 'inline-flex',
  alignItems: 'center',
  justifyContent: 'center',
  overflow: 'hidden',
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.md,
  cursor: 'zoom-in',
  minHeight: '3rem',
  transition: 'transform 0.25s ease',
})

globalStyle('.rr-image-frame:hover', { transform: 'translateY(-1px)' })

globalStyle('.rr-image-img', {
  display: 'block',
  width: '100%',
  height: 'auto',
  maxWidth: '100%',
  opacity: 0,
  transition: 'opacity 280ms ease',
  borderRadius: '0px !important',
})

const imageLoad = keyframes({
  '0%': {
    mask: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #000 25%, #000000e6 50%, #00000000) 150% 0 / 400% no-repeat',
    opacity: 0.16,
  },
  '100%': {
    mask: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #000 25%, #000000e6 50%, #00000000) 0 / 400% no-repeat',
    opacity: 1,
  },
})

globalStyle('.rr-image-loaded .rr-image-img', {
  opacity: 1,
  animation: `${imageLoad} 420ms ease`,
})

globalStyle('.rr-image-error .rr-image-img', { display: 'none' })

const imageSpin = keyframes({ to: { transform: 'rotate(360deg)' } })

globalStyle('.rr-image-loader', {
  position: 'absolute',
  width: '1.65rem',
  height: '1.65rem',
  border: `2px solid color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.textSecondary} 45%, transparent)`,
  borderTopColor: `color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.text} 65%, transparent)`,
  borderRadius: '50%',
  animation: `${imageSpin} 0.75s linear infinite`,
})

globalStyle('.rr-image-error', {
  fontSize: '0.8rem',
  color: vars.color.alertCaution,
  background: `color-mix(in srgb, ${vars.color.bg} 86%, transparent)`,
  borderRadius: '999px',
  padding: '0.15rem 0.6rem',
})

globalStyle('.rr-image-caption', {
  marginTop: '0.5rem',
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
  fontSize: '0.86rem',
  lineHeight: '1.5',
})

// ─── Image (from editor shared) ──────────────────────────
globalStyle('.rich-image', {
  margin: `${vars.spacing.md} 0`,
  textAlign: 'center',
})

globalStyle('.rich-image figcaption', {
  fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeSmall,
  color: vars.color.textSecondary,
  marginTop: vars.spacing.sm,
  lineHeight: vars.typography.lineHeightTight,
})

globalStyle('.rich-image-container', {
  position: 'relative',
  display: 'inline-block',
  overflow: 'hidden',
  borderRadius: vars.borderRadius.md,
  transition: 'background-color 0.3s ease',
})

globalStyle('.rich-image-hidden', {
  opacity: 0,
  transition: 'opacity 0.3s ease',
})

globalStyle('.rich-image-visible', {
  opacity: 1,
  transition: 'opacity 0.3s ease',
})

const richImageZoomIn = keyframes({
  from: { opacity: 0 },
  to: { opacity: 1 },
})
```

```
import './styles.css'

import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
import { useRendererMode } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { Popover, PopoverPanel, PopoverTrigger } from '@shiro/rich-editor-ui'
import { $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode } from 'lexical'
import { AtSign, ExternalLink, Trash2, User } from 'lucide-react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import type { MentionRendererProps } from './MentionRenderer'
import {
  MentionRenderer,
  platformKeys,
  platformMetaMap,
} from './MentionRenderer'

export function MentionEditRenderer(props: MentionRendererProps) {
  const mode = useRendererMode()

  if (mode !== 'editor') {
    return <MentionRenderer {...props} />
  }

  return <MentionEditRendererInner {...props} />
}

function MentionEditRendererInner({
  platform,
  handle,
  displayName,
}: MentionRendererProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const editable = editor.isEditable()
  const wrapperRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement>(null)

  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)
  const [editPlatform, setEditPlatform] = useState(platform)
  const [editHandle, setEditHandle] = useState(handle)
  const [editDisplayName, setEditDisplayName] = useState(displayName || '')

  useEffect(() => {
    setEditPlatform(platform)
    setEditHandle(handle)
    setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
  }, [platform, handle, displayName])

  const commitChanges = useCallback(() => {
    const trimmedHandle = editHandle.trim()
    if (!trimmedHandle) return
    if (!wrapperRef.current) return

    editor.update(() => {
      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
      if (!node) return
      const writable = node.getWritable() as unknown as Record<string, unknown>
      writable.__platform = editPlatform
      writable.__handle = trimmedHandle
      writable.__displayName = editDisplayName.trim() || undefined
    })
    setOpen(false)
  }, [editor, editPlatform, editHandle, editDisplayName])

  const handleDelete = useCallback(() => {
    if (!wrapperRef.current) return

    editor.update(() => {
      const node = $getNearestNodeFromDOMNode(wrapperRef.current!)
      if (node) node.remove()
    })
    setOpen(false)
  }, [editor])

  const handleOpen = useCallback(() => {
    const normalizedHandle = handle.replace(/^@+/, '')
    const meta = platformMetaMap[platform]
    if (meta) {
      window.open(
        meta.getUrl(normalizedHandle),
        '_blank',
        'noopener,noreferrer',
      )
    }
  }, [platform, handle])

  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault()
        commitChanges()
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        e.preventDefault()
        setEditPlatform(platform)
        setEditHandle(handle)
        setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
        setOpen(false)
      }
    },
    [commitChanges, platform, handle, displayName],
  )

  if (!editable) {
    return (
      <MentionRenderer
        platform={platform}
        handle={handle}
        displayName={displayName}
      />
    )
  }

  return (
    <Popover
      open={open}
      onOpenChange={(nextOpen: boolean) => {
        setOpen(nextOpen)
        if (!nextOpen) {
          setEditPlatform(platform)
          setEditHandle(handle)
          setEditDisplayName(displayName || '')
        }
      }}
    >
      <PopoverTrigger
        delay={200}
        closeDelay={300}
        openOnHover
        render={<span ref={wrapperRef} className="rich-mention-edit-trigger" />}
      >
        <MentionRenderer
          platform={platform}
          handle={handle}
          displayName={displayName}
        />
      </PopoverTrigger>
      <PopoverPanel
        side="bottom"
        sideOffset={8}
        className="rich-mention-edit-panel"
      >
        <div className="rich-mention-edit-field">
          <span
            className="rich-mention-edit-field-icon"
            style={{ fontSize: 14 }}
            aria-hidden
          >
            {platformMetaMap[editPlatform]?.icon ?? <AtSign size={14} />}
          </span>
          <select
            className="rich-mention-edit-select"
            value={editPlatform}
            onChange={(e) => setEditPlatform(e.target.value)}
          >
            {platformKeys.map((key) => (
              <option key={key} value={key}>
                {platformMetaMap[key]!.label}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>
        <div className="rich-mention-edit-field">
          <AtSign className="rich-mention-edit-field-icon" size={14} />
          <input
            className="rich-mention-edit-input"
            type="text"
            value={editHandle}
            onChange={(e) => setEditHandle(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            place
... (truncated)
```

```
import 'react-photo-view/dist/react-photo-view.css'
import './styles.css'

import { decodeThumbHash, type ImageRendererProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import type { ComponentType, CSSProperties } from 'react'
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'

type ImageLoadState = 'loading' | 'loaded' | 'error'

function getCaptionText(altText: string, caption?: string): string | undefined {
  if (caption) return caption
  if (!altText) return undefined
  if (altText.startsWith('!') || altText.startsWith('¡')) {
    return altText.slice(1)
  }
  return undefined
}

export const ImageRenderer: ComponentType<ImageRendererProps> = ({
  src,
  altText,
  width,
  height,
  caption,
  thumbhash,
  accent,
}) => {
  const [state, setState] = useState<ImageLoadState>('loading')

  const captionText = useMemo(
    () => getCaptionText(altText, caption),
    [altText, caption],
  )

  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    [thumbhash],
  )

  if (!src) return null

  const frameStyle: CSSProperties = {
    backgroundColor: !placeholderUrl ? accent || '#f5f5f5' : undefined,
    backgroundImage:
      placeholderUrl && state !== 'loaded'
        ? `url(${placeholderUrl})`
        : undefined,
    backgroundSize: 'cover',
    width: width ? Math.min(width, 1200) : undefined,
    maxWidth: '100%',
    ...(width && height ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}` } : {}),
  }

  return (
    <figure className="rr-image-root">
      <PhotoProvider photoClosable>
        <PhotoView src={src}>
          <div
            className={`rr-image-frame rr-image-${state}`}
            style={frameStyle}
            role="button"
            tabIndex={0}
            aria-label={`Open image: ${altText || 'image'}`}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (e.key !== 'Enter' && e.key !== ' ') return
              e.preventDefault()
              e.currentTarget.click()
            }}
          >
            <img
              src={src}
              alt={altText}
              width={width}
              height={height}
              loading="lazy"
              className="rr-image-img"
              onLoad={() => setState('loaded')}
              onError={() => setState('error')}
            />

            {state === 'loading' && <span className="rr-image-loader" />}

            {state === 'error' && (
              <span className="rr-image-error">Image failed to load</span>
            )}
          </div>
        </PhotoView>
      </PhotoProvider>

      {captionText && (
        <figcaption className="rr-image-caption">{captionText}</figcaption>
      )}
    </figure>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>

```
Chunk ID: bbb892

Output:
import type {
  EditorConfig,
  LexicalEditor,
  LexicalNode,
  NodeKey,
  SerializedLexicalNode,
  Spread,
} from 'lexical'
import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
import { ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react'
import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
import { createElement } from 'react'

import { ImageRenderer } from '../components/renderers/ImageRenderer'
import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'

export type SerializedImageNode = Spread<
  {
    src: string
    altText: string
    width?: number
    height?: number
    caption?: string
    thumbhash?: string
    accent?: string
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

function sanitizeImageSrc(src: string): string {
  const trimmed = src.trim()
  if (/^(javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(trimmed)) {
    return ''
  }
  return trimmed
}

function sanitizeColor(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
  if (!value) return undefined
  const trimmed = value.trim()
  if (/^#[\da-f]{3,8}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
  if (/^(rgb|hsl)a?\([^)]+\)$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
  if (/^[a-z]{3,20}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
  return undefined
}

export interface ImageNodePayload {
  src: string
  altText: string
  width?: number
  height?: number
  caption?: string
  thumbhash?: string
  accent?: string
}

export class ImageNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __src: string
  __altText: string
  __width?: number
  __height?: number
  __caption?: string
  __thumbhash?: string
  __accent?: string

  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    {
      title: 'Image',
      icon: createElement(ImageIcon, { size: 20 }),
      description: 'Upload or embed an image',
      keywords: ['image', 'picture', 'photo'],
      section: 'MEDIA',
      onSelect: (editor) => {
        editor.update(() => {
          $insertNodes([$createImageNode({ src: '', altText: '' })])
        })
      },
    },
  ]

  static getType(): string {
    return 'image'
  }

  static clone(node: ImageNode): ImageNode {
    return new ImageNode(
      {
        src: node.__src,
        altText: node.__altText,
        width: node.__width,
        height: node.__height,
        caption: node.__caption,
        thumbhash: node.__thumbhash,
        accent: node.__accent,
      },
      node.__key,
    )
  }

  constructor(payload: ImageNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    super(key)
    this.__src = sanitizeImageSrc(payload.src)
    this.__altText = payload.altText
    this.__width = payload.width
    this.__height = payload.height
    this.__caption = payload.caption
    this.__thumbhash = payload.thumbhash
    this.__accent = sanitizeColor(payload.accent)
  }

  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    const div = document.createElement('div')
    div.className = 'rich-image-wrapper'
    return div
  }

  updateDOM(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  isInline(): boolean {
    return false
  }

  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedImageNode): ImageNode {
    return $createImageNode({
      src: serializedNode.src,
      altText: serializedNode.altText,
      width: serializedNode.width,
      height: serializedNode.height,
      caption: serializedNode.caption,
      thumbhash: serializedNode.thumbhash,
      accent: serializedNode.accent,
    })
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedImageNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'image',
      src: this.__src,
      altText: this.__altText,
      width: this.__width,
      height: this.__height,
      caption: this.__caption,
      thumbhash: this.__thumbhash,
      accent: this.__accent,
      version: 1,
    }
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createRendererDecoration('Image', ImageRenderer, {
      src: this.__src,
      altText: this.__altText,
      width: this.__width,
      height: this.__height,
      caption: this.__caption,
      thumbhash: this.__thumbhash,
      accent: this.__accent,
    })
  }
}

export function $createImageNode(payload: ImageNodePayload): ImageNode {
  return new ImageNode(payload)
}

export function $isImageNode(
  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
): node is ImageNode {
  return node instanceof ImageNode
}
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-mini 2026-02-18 17:13:35Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Identifying missing sanitization in image editing**

I'm exploring a potential high-severity issue in the new `ImageEditRenderer`: when committing changes to an image `src`, it bypasses the existing `sanitizeImageSrc` function that originally protects against malicious inputs like `javascript:` URLs. This gap could introduce script injection vulnerabilities since sanitization only occurs during node creation, not on edits. I want to confirm if other edit renderers handle sanitization differently, but so far this looks like a unique risk here. Additionally, there are no tests covering this new functionality, and some state handling quirks around image loading that might warrant attention. I'll gather exact line references to include in a clear, severity-ordered review comment highlighting these concerns.
</details></think>

I’ll also note open questions about whether the sanitize helper could be exported for reuse, and provide a concise summary covering the addition of the new edit renderer and related aggregator updates.     31	function sanitizeImageSrc(src: string): string {
```
    32	  const trimmed = src.trim()
    33	  if (/^(javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(trimmed)) {
    34	    return ''
    35	  }
    36	  return trimmed
    37	}
    38	
    39	function sanitizeColor(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
    40	  if (!value) return undefined
    41	  const trimmed = value.trim()
    42	  if (/^#[\da-f]{3,8}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    43	  if (/^(rgb|hsl)a?\([^)]+\)$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    44	  if (/^[a-z]{3,20}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    45	  return undefined
    46	}
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Summarizing code changes and questions**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-mini 2026-02-18 17:14:08Z)**_

- **High – Unsanitized src update** (`packages/rich-renderer-image/src/ImageEditRenderer.tsx:85`)  
  `commitChanges` writes `trimmedSrc` straight to `writable.__src` without running the same `sanitizeImageSrc` that `ImageNode` applies on creation (`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/ImageNode.ts:31`). That means typing `javascript:` or a non-image `data:` URL now survives edit/serialize and can end up in the document, whereas the earlier insert path would have dropped it. Please reuse the sanitization logic (or expose a shared helper) before mutating the node so the editor keeps the same XSS-safe behaviour.

- **Medium – No automated coverage for the edit UI** (`packages/rich-renderer-image/src/ImageEditRenderer.tsx:1`)  
  This diff introduces an entirely new edit renderer with interaction-heavy state (`open`, `commitChanges`, `handleDelete`, etc.) but no accompanying test file. Existing renderer packages tend to add smoke or interaction tests when they ship new edit UI, and without any assertions we risk regressions (focus handling, commit/reset behavior, delete path) slipping through. Adding a Jest/Playwright-style test that ensures `commitChanges` sanitizes/updates props and that delete closes the popover would guard this new surface.

Open questions/assumptions:
1. Is there an exported helper in `@shiro/rich-editor` we can reuse for sanitizing image URLs? If not, should `sanitizeImageSrc` be exported so both the node constructor and edit UI share one implementation?

Change summary:
- Added `ImageEditRenderer` plus the corresponding export/aggregate wiring so the edit renderer bundle exposes the component and can be referenced from `rich-renderers-edit`.
- Introduced layout styles and dependencies (`lexical`, `@lexical/react`, `@shiro/rich-editor-ui`, `lucide-react`) needed by the popover-based editor.

---
